basic_details.job_title: Mumbai Port Authority Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mumbai Port Authority (MbPA) Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Mumbai Port Authority. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the MbPA Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: Not more than 45 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB/Post Graduate Degree in Gen. Medicine/Anaesthesia or DNB Critical Care Management or FCCM or Fellowship of College of Critical Care Medicine or Diploma in Anaesthesia or Chest & TB or IDCCM for Intensivist. MBBS Degree with MS/DNB in Radiology or MBBS with Diploma in Radiology for Radiology.
qualification.details: Medical Officer (Intensivist) | MBBS Degree of a Statutory University MD/DNB/Post Graduate Degree in Gen. Medicine/Anaesthesia - 3 Years DNB Critical Care Management - 3 Years FCCM (Fellowship in Critical Care Medicine by DNB) - 2 Years Fellowship of College of Critical Care Medicine - 2 Years Diploma in Anaesthesia or Chest & TB - 2 years IDCCM (Indian Diploma in Critical Care Medicine) - 1 Year or similar Minimum one year of experience as a Medical Officer in ICU or ICCU in a recognized hospital. | Medical Officer (Radiology) | M.B.B.S. degree of a statutory university. MS/ DNB in Radiology M.B.B.S. with Diploma in Radiology or equivalent One year experience as a Medical Officer in a well-established hospital after completion of internship.

salary_details.details: Medical Officer (Intensivist) | Rs. 1,00,000.00 to Rs. 1,27,000.00 per month | Medical Officer (Radiology) | Rs. 1,15,000/- p.m to Rs. 1,27,000/- p.m

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Mumbai Port Authority Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mumbai Port Authority Medical Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the Medical Officer posts at Mumbai Port Authority is 08-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Medical Officers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Medical Officer posts in the Mumbai Port Authority recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer (Intensivist) post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer (Intensivist) post, candidates need an MBBS degree along with specific postgraduate qualifications like MD/DNB in General Medicine/Anaesthesia, DNB Critical Care Management, FCCM, or equivalent.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Medical Officer posts is not more than 45 years as per the notification.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their filled application form along with scanned copies of relevant documents to the Chief Medical Officer at [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Medical Officers ranges from Rs. 1,00,000.00 to Rs. 1,27,000.00 per month, depending on the specialization.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Medical Officer positions will be based on a walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these Medical Officer positions?
faq.answer: These Medical Officer positions are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Mumbai Port Authority located?
faq.answer: The Mumbai Port Authority is located in Wadala, Maharashtra.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
